revision.text:
[[arz:ضريح اوبا]][[en:Aoba Shrine]][[fr:Aoba-jinja]][[ja:青葉神社]][[ru:Храм Аоба]] {{Infobox religious building | name = Aoba Jinja
青葉神社 | image = File:Aoba Shrine.jpg | caption = Honden of Aoba Jinja | map_type = Japan Miyagi Prefecture#Japan | map_alt = | coordinates = {{Coord|38.282833|N|140.862889|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} | map_relief = | map_size = | map_caption = | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | type = | deity = {{ill|Date Masamune|qid=Q311183|1=Date Masamune}} | founded_by = | established = 7 February 1874 | date_destroyed = | location = 7-1 Aoba-cho, Aoba-ku, Sendai-shi, Miyagi-ken 980-0916 | website = {{URL|http://www.aoba-jinja.com|qq=}} | architecture_style = | festival = October 9, 10 | leadership = | location = {{ill|Aoba-ku|qid=Q1042308|1=Aoba-ku, Sendai}} }} {{nihongo|'''Aoba Shrine'''|青葉神社|Aoba Jinja|qq=}} is the {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|qid=Q845945|lt=memorial shrine|1=Shinto shrine}} of {{ill|Date Masamune|en|Date Masamune|qid=Q311183|lt=Date Masamune|1=Date Masamune}}, located in {{ill|Aoba-ku, Sendai|en|Aoba-ku, Sendai|qid=Q1042308|lt=Aoba-ku, Sendai|1=Aoba-ku, Sendai}}, {{ill|Miyagi Prefecture|en|Miyagi Prefecture|qid=Q47896|lt=Miyagi Prefecture|1=Miyagi Prefecture}}, {{ill|Japan|en|Japan|qid=Q17|lt=Japan|1=Japan}}, near the site of the former {{ill|Aoba Castle|en|Aoba Castle|qid=Q598621|lt=Aoba Castle|1=Aoba Castle}}. The shrine was built in 1873 by petition of former retainers of the {{ill|Date clan|en|Date clan|qid=Q1151061|lt=Date clan|1=Date clan}} of former {{ill|Sendai Domain|en|Sendai Domain|qid=Q1062182|lt=Sendai Domain|1=Sendai Domain}} to enshrine the deified spirit (''[[kami]]'') of Date Masamune under the name of ''Takefuruhiko-no-mikoto''. This was in accordance with a practice which began in the [[:en:Bakumatsu period|Bakumatsu period]] and continued into the early {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} of establishing a shrine to the founders of the ''[[:en:Daimyō|Daimyō]]'' clan which ruled each {{ill|Han system|en|Han system|qid=Q841985|lt=feudal domain|1=Han system}} under the [[Tokugawa shogunate]]. Under the {{ill|State Shinto|en|State Shinto|qid=Q1197248|lt=State Shinto|1=State Shinto}} [[Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|Ranking system]], the shrine was designated as a prefectural shrine. The current [[Honden]] dates from 1927. The [[torii]] gate was damaged in the {{ill|2011 Tōhoku earthquake and tsunami|en|2011 Tōhoku earthquake and tsunami|qid=Q36204|lt=2011 Tōhoku earthquake and tsunami|1=2011 Tōhoku earthquake and tsunami}}.{{cite web |url=http://www.yomiuri.co.jp/national/culture/news/20110312-OYT1T00635.htm |title=岡倉天心ゆかりの文化財「六角堂」、津波で消失 |publisher=[[Daily Yomiuri]] |date=12 March 2011 |accessdate=6 May 2011|qq=}} Its current chief priest is [[:en:Katakura Shigenobu|Katakura Shigenobu]], the 16th hereditary chieftain of the [[Katakura clan]], who served as castellans of [[:en:Shirakawa Castle|Shirakawa Castle]] under the Date clan.{{Citation needed|date=November 2024|qq=}} ==References== {{Reflist|qq=}} ==External links== *{{Official website|1=http://www.aoba-jinja.com|qq=}} {{in lang|ja|qq=}} *[http://www.ne.jp/asahi/gu-tara.web/gu-tara/masamuneoyuku/aobajinjya.html Pictures of Aoba Jinja] {{Shinto shrine|qq=}} {{Authority control|qq=}} {{Shinto-stub|qq=}} [[en:Aoba Shrine]] [[arz:ضريح اوبا]] {{Commons category|Aoba Shrine}} [[fr:Aoba-jinja]] [[ja:青葉神社]] [[ru:Храм Аоба]] {{wikidata link|Q2857954}} [[Category:1870s establishments in Japan]] [[Category:Facilities opened in 1874]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Sendai]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Aoba-ku, Sendai]] [[Category:History of Aoba Ward, Sendai]] [[Category:伊達政宗]] [[Category:Kita-Sendai]] [[Category:Former Prefectural Shrines in Miyagi Prefecture]]
